review_metadata.scope: Deep architecture and governance review: governance completeness, cross-repo constitutional strength, review culture, operational readiness, artifact and contract quality, CI/automation enforcement
review_metadata.reviewer: Claude (Principal Systems Architect — Governance Constitutional Review)

findings.title: Phase 1 enforcement not initiated: governance-declaration.template.json does not exist
findings.description: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json explicitly requested by GA-007 (2026-03-14-governance-architecture-review) does not exist. Phase 1 of the governance enforcement roadmap cannot be activated without it.

findings.title: Artifact boundary CI does not enforce implementation code boundary
findings.description: scripts/check_artifact_boundary.py enforces data artifact rules only; spectrum_systems/study_runner/ passes boundary CI unchallenged.
findings.recommended_action: Extend scripts/check_artifact_boundary.py to detect Python packages outside scripts/, root-level run_*.py scripts, and src/ directories.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Extend artifact-boundary CI to enforce implementation code boundary

findings.title: Production Python package spectrum_systems/ remains in governance-only repo
findings.description: spectrum_systems/study_runner/ violates CLAUDE.md boundary rule. Identified in RC-1 (2026-03-15), A-1 (2026-03-15 audit), GA-008 (2026-03-14) — carried forward unresolved across three reviews.
findings.recommended_action: Move spectrum_systems/study_runner/ to an engine repo, or formally document governance exemption in DECISIONS.md.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Resolve production Python package in governance repo: remove or formally exempt spectrum_systems/

findings.title: Schema authority is split across two directories without canonical designation
findings.description: Root schemas/ and contracts/schemas/ both contain schemas with no canonical source designation. Downstream repos face ambiguous import paths.
findings.recommended_action: Add Schema Authority section to schemas/README.md declaring contracts/schemas/ as canonical for contract schemas. Cross-reference in CONTRACTS.md.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Designate canonical schema authority in schemas/README.md

findings.title: Cross-repo compliance scanner validates file presence only; policy engine not wired to CI
findings.description: The compliance scanner checks for file presence. governance/policies/run-policy-engine.py (4 GOV policies) is not invoked in any CI workflow.
findings.recommended_action: Add a step in cross-repo-compliance.yml that runs run-policy-engine.py and fails on violations.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Wire governance policy engine to cross-repo compliance CI workflow

findings.title: All review registry entries are Open with no per-finding resolution tracking
findings.description: Seven reviews are Open/In Progress with no per-finding resolution mechanism. RC-1 violation appears in 3 reviews without closure tracking.
findings.recommended_action: Extend review-registry.schema.json with per-finding resolution tracking; define closure criteria.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Add per-finding resolution tracking to review registry

findings.title: Governance conformance checklist is missing key pre-release gate items
findings.description: docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md is missing: machine-readable declaration requirement, evaluation harness completion, ADR review, CI-enforcement confirmation, lifecycle gate verification.
findings.recommended_action: Add five new checklist items to docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md.
findings.suggested_issue_title: Expand governance-conformance-checklist.md with evaluation, ADR, CI, and declaration requirements

findings.title: AGENTS.md is vestigial
findings.description: AGENTS.md (35 lines) adds no value over CLAUDE.md and CODEX.md. GA-010 identified this in 2026-03-14 review.
findings.recommended_action: Rewrite AGENTS.md as ecosystem agent entry point or redirect to CLAUDE.md/CODEX.md.

findings.title: Eval harness directories for SYS-005 through SYS-009 absent
findings.description: eval/test-matrix.md only covers SYS-001 through SYS-004. GA-011 identified this in 2026-03-14 review.
findings.recommended_action: Create eval/ directories for each missing system and add test-matrix.md rows.

findings.title: ADR framework does not cover post-sprint architecture decisions
findings.description: Five ADRs cover initial phase only. Governance manifest, Phase 1 enforcement, and schema authority decisions have no ADRs.
findings.recommended_action: File ADR-006 through ADR-008 for post-sprint governance decisions.

executive_summary: spectrum-systems is at maturity Level 2 (Structured) approaching Level 3 (Governed).
contracts/governance-declaration.template.json — the Phase 1 trigger artifact — does not exist.
Artifact boundary CI passes production code; spectrum_systems/ violates the repo's own boundary rule across three unresolved reviews.
Policy engine (GOV-001–GOV-004) has zero enforcement value because it is not wired to CI.
Schema authority is ambiguous across two directories.
strengths: Design review artifact system is production-grade with schema-backed validation and GitHub Issues bridge.
18 contracts with machine-readable registry, semver versioning, and CI-validated examples.
Governance policy engine is present with four evaluable policies.
Five ADRs provide navigable decision history for the initial build phase.

gaps.statement: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json does not exist; Phase 1 enforcement cannot be activated without it.
scripts/check_artifact_boundary.py does not detect Python packages or runnable scripts; spectrum_systems/ passes boundary CI unchallenged.
schemas/README.md does not designate a canonical schema authority.
governance/policies/run-policy-engine.py is not invoked in any CI workflow.
docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md is missing machine-readable declaration, evaluation harness, ADR review, CI-enforcement, and lifecycle gate items.
All seven review registry entries are Open or In Progress; no per-finding resolution mechanism exists.
ADR framework ends at the initial build phase; governance manifest model and Phase 1 strategy have no ADRs.

risks.statement: Governance enforcement is entirely manual; downstream repos have no machine-verifiable commitment.
risks.rationale: Phase 1 not initiated; no governance declaration template exists.

risks.statement: Self-governance failure — production code in governance repo — undermines constitutional authority.
risks.rationale: spectrum_systems/ identified in three reviews without resolution.

risks.statement: Schema dual-track will produce divergent imports and undetectable drift at scale.
risks.rationale: No canonical designation; both directories contain domain-overlapping schemas.

risks.statement: Review culture generates institutional debt; 80+ action items across 7 open reviews with no closure mechanism.
risks.rationale: All seven entries are Open/In Progress; same findings recur without closure.

risks.statement: Policy engine provides zero enforcement value; four governance policies are present but untriggered in CI.
risks.rationale: run-policy-engine.py not invoked in any workflow.

recommendations.statement: Create contracts/governance-declaration.template.json with complete field specification and SYS-001 example. Update docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md and docs/governance-enforcement-roadmap.md to initiate Phase 1 enforcement.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Phase 1 has a concrete template; downstream repos can file machine-verifiable governance declarations; system-factory can scaffold declarations automatically.

recommendations.statement: Extend scripts/check_artifact_boundary.py to detect Python packages outside scripts/ with non-trivial business logic, root-level run_*.py scripts, and any src/ directory. Maintain explicit allowlist for scripts/. Document in docs/implementation-boundary.md.
recommendations.expected_outcome: spectrum_systems/ would fail boundary CI; future production code additions are blocked automatically; self-governance credibility gap is closed.

recommendations.statement: Add a Schema Authority section to schemas/README.md declaring contracts/schemas/ as canonical for governed contract schemas and root schemas/ as supplemental for non-contract structural schemas. Update CONTRACTS.md to reference this designation.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Downstream repos resolve import ambiguity deterministically; schema drift detection becomes possible; dual-track authority is eliminated.

recommendations.statement: Add a step in .github/workflows/cross-repo-compliance.yml that runs governance/policies/run-policy-engine.py against all example governance manifests and fails the workflow on any policy violation.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Four GOV policies produce CI pass/fail signals; governance manifests that violate policy cannot merge; policy engine gains real enforcement value.

recommendations.statement: Extend docs/reviews/review-registry.schema.json to support per-finding resolution tracking and define formal closure criteria: a review is Closed only when all findings are resolved, deferred with a trigger, or superseded.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Finding accumulation becomes visible; review pipeline generates resolution pressure; carried-forward violations are machine-traceable across reviews.

recommendations.statement: Add five missing items to docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md: machine-readable governance declaration, evaluation harness completion with pass/fail recorded, ADR review, CI-enforcement confirmation, and system lifecycle gate verification.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Checklist becomes a complete pre-release gate; implementation repos have unambiguous compliance criteria.

recommendations.statement: File ADR-006 for the governance manifest model and policy engine, ADR-007 for Phase 1 enforcement strategy, and ADR-008 for schema authority designation. Use docs/adr/ADR-TEMPLATE.md and reference motivating review IDs in each.
recommendations.expected_outcome: Decision record covers the full development history; subsequent reviewers can trace governance architecture choices.

actions.title: Create contracts/governance-declaration.template.json
actions.description: Create the Phase 1 governance declaration template with complete field specification and SYS-001 example.
actions.expected_artifact: contracts/governance-declaration.template.json with complete field structure and SYS-001 example
acceptance_criteria: All required fields present: system_id, implementation_repo, architecture_source, contract_pins, schema_pins, rule_version, prompt_set_hash, evaluation_manifest_path, last_evaluation_date, external_storage_policy, governance_declaration_version
SYS-001 example uses real contract versions from contracts/standards-manifest.json
docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md references the template in a new checklist item

actions.title: Update governance-enforcement-roadmap.md to mark Phase 1 as initiated
actions.description: Add Status: Initiated to Phase 1, reference the template, record initiation date.
actions.follow_up_trigger: When Phase 1 transitions from Initiated to Active

actions.title: Extend artifact boundary CI to detect implementation code violations
actions.description: Update scripts/check_artifact_boundary.py to flag Python packages, run_*.py scripts, and src/ directories.
acceptance_criteria: Script flags spectrum_systems/ as a violation
Script flags run_study.py as a violation
actions.follow_up_trigger: When boundary CI flags spectrum_systems/ and the production code is removed or formally exempted

actions.title: Designate canonical schema authority in schemas/README.md
actions.description: Add Schema Authority section and cross-reference in CONTRACTS.md.
acceptance_criteria: contracts/schemas/ declared canonical for contract schemas
Root schemas/ declared supplemental for non-contract structural schemas
Overlapping schemas identified with migration path
actions.follow_up_trigger: When schemas/README.md and CONTRACTS.md are merged

actions.title: Wire governance policy engine to cross-repo compliance CI
actions.description: Add policy engine invocation step to .github/workflows/cross-repo-compliance.yml.
acceptance_criteria: Policy engine step added to workflow
actions.follow_up_trigger: When policy engine step is added and at least one policy violation causes CI failure

actions.title: Expand docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md
actions.description: Add five new checklist items: declaration, evaluation, ADR, CI, and lifecycle gate.
actions.expected_artifact: Updated docs/governance-conformance-checklist.md with at least 18 items
actions.follow_up_trigger: When checklist is updated and tested against at least one implementation repo

actions.title: Create ADRs for post-sprint governance architecture decisions
actions.description: File ADR-006 through ADR-008 for governance manifest model, Phase 1 enforcement strategy, and schema authority designation.
actions.expected_artifact: Three new ADR files in docs/adr/
acceptance_criteria: ADR-006 covers governance manifest model and policy engine
actions.follow_up_trigger: When A-1, A-2, and A-4 are completed

triggers: When Phase 1 transitions from Initiated to Active
When any downstream implementation repo reaches pilot status
